# Menzerna Power Lock Ultimate Protection 32oz

Regular price $89.95 CAD

Brand: Menzerna

Barcode: 4260063015564

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Product Image: //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Menzerna_PowerLock_1l_2a8f7f5f-6b70-402b-8551-3d941f52faad.jpg?v=1633634814&width=1800

## Menzerna's premium polymer coating sealant for all automotive clear coats.

Menzerna Power Lock Ultimate Protection (PLUP) is the long-lasting polymer coating sealant for all automotive clear coats. PLUP effectively seals the coating surface for long-lasting preservation, protecting against damaging environmental influences while maintaining a brilliant deep gloss. In addition, PLUP adds a superb beading effect. Maintain with Menzerna Endless Shine.

**Benefits:**
- Sealing technology of the latest generation
- Extremely long service life (up to 6 months)
- Maximum protection against environmental influences
- Premium beading behaviour
- Protects the vehicle's value

Menzerna sealants offer long-lasting protection against environmental influences. For a protected, perceptibly smoother surface with a brilliant gloss. Ideal protection against dirt and optimum beading behaviour are guaranteed: the best polishing compounds for clear coats.

# Power Lock Ultimate Protection

## Polymer sealant for all automotive clear coats

This specialist product with staying power not only offers a long-lasting seal, but also reliably protects against environmental influences. The polymer sealant boasts an unbeatable beading effect, not to mention peerless deep shine. Also suitable as a long-lasting coat sealant for new vehicles.

*This product is intended exclusively for commercial/industrial use. It is not meant to be supplied to private end users.*

Premium long-lasting sealant

### Processing

- Orbital: Low rotational speed range
- By hand: Light pressure with circular motions

### Volumes

- 250ml | 22070.281.001
- 1l | 22070.261.001

### Service life

6 months

### Steps

- Step 1: Heavy Cut
- Step 2: Medium Cut
- Step 3: Finish
- Step 4: Protection

### Optimised for

- Premium Microfiber Cloth
- Hand Polishing Applicator
- Wax Foam Pad

### Product Images

- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_PLUP_1100x1100.png
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autoversiegelung_Power_Lock_freigestellt_1100x1100.png
- /fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22070.261.001/rotation01.jpg

### Benefits

- Cutting-edge sealant technology
- Exceptionally long service life
- Maximum protection against environmental influences
- Premium beading effect
- Vehicle value retention

### Recommended usage

- Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
- Shake the bottle before use and apply the sealant to the Wax Foam Pad.
- Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The product can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
- Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
- Leave the sealant to dry for 25 to 30 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure. Leave the sealant to harden in a protected area for at least 3 hours.
- Optionally, you can reapply PLUP after 4 hours for a longer-lasting sealing effect.

### Downloads

- Technical datasheet Power Lock Ultimate Protection (122.32 KB): /fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_15_Power_Lock_EN_09.2021.pdf

### FAQ

**What is the service life of Power Lock and how do I remove it?**
Power Lock has a service life of approximately six months and can be removed with a Heavy Cut polish (e.g., HCC400) in combination with the Heavy Cut Foam Pad.

**How do I use Menzerna Power Lock?**
Power Lock should be distributed evenly over the paint using the Wax Foam Pad with a low rotational speed and low pressure. Continue polishing the surface until it's transparent. Wait at least 20 to 30 minutes and then remove any excess polish with a microfiber cloth and allow to harden for several hours. Detailed instructions are available in the technical datasheet.

**What do beading and sheeting mean?**
Beading refers to the surface's ability to form beads, and can be achieved with car waxes and sealants. Sheeting is when a sealant is applied to a surface to make it water-repellent, with the effect that water immediately flows off of the car, taking any loose surface dirt with it.

**What does a polishing training course with Menzerna products cost?**
In Germany, a one-day Menzerna training course costs €249 per person, including Menzerna starter pack and food. Prices may vary in other countries. Please contact your certified Menzerna trainer directly for prices.

**What's the difference between a wax and a sealant?**
A polishing wax seals the surface with wax and is primarily made from naturally occurring components. Car wax has a maximum service life of three months. Sealant seals car paint with synthetically produced polymers and has a maximum service life of six months.

### Video

Car sealant Power Lock: Thanks to polymer technology, Menzerna Power Lock offers long-lasting sealing and represents a genuine alternative to a ceramic coating. Power Lock boasts speedy and straightforward application and delivers long-lasting protection for car coats.
Video URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rlDx88eUy1M

# Menzerna Power Lock (250ml & 1L)

Brand: Menzerna
Product code: 22070.281.001
In Stock

Selected Size: 250ml / 1 Litre
Price: £17.25

Product Images:
- /DynamicImages/21401-700-700/power-lock.png
- /DynamicImages/17122-700-700/power-lock.png

## Your Secret Weapon For Long-Lasting Protection.

Menzerna Power Lock is a polymer coating sealant suitable for all types of gloss automotive paint finishes. As well as imparting a high shine, Power Lock also protects against environmental fallout and has excellent water-beading properties. The polymer sealant maximizes your car's shine and reflection. The Menzerna Power Lock Ultimate Protection is a car paint sealant with polymers that have added gloss particles to ensure that the clear coat on your car has maximum reflection.

**How long does Menzerna power lock last?**
For normal use and conditions, Menzerna Power Lock will last about 4-6 months.

**Features:**
- Durable protection
- Repels environmental fallout
- Imparts a brilliant shine

**How To Use:**
- Ensure surface is clean, dry & cool to the touch
- Cleanse surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner to remove polish & silicone residues
- Use a soft foam finishing pad
- If using a DA polisher, apply 3-4 pea-sized drops to the pad
- If using a rotary polisher, apply 1-2 pea-sized drops to the pad
- Place pad against paintwork & start polisher on a slow speed to spread the product
- Work product on a medium-to-high speed (4-6 with a Dual Action, 3-4 with a Rotary) until an oily film appears
- Allow to cure for up to 15 minutes
- Buff residue with soft microfibre
- May also be applied by hand

**Technical Specification:**
- Cut: 0/10
- Gloss: 10/10
- Water-based
- Does not contain fillers
- Suitable for use with rotary & dual action machine polishers
- Suitable for application by hand

**Sizes: 250ml & 1 Litre**

### Documents

- Menzerna Power Lock Technical Data Sheet: /Documents/Menzerna/Menzerna-Power-Lock-Ultimate-Protection.pdf
- Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS): /documents/MSDS/Menzerna-Power-Lock.pdf
